nodes.label: AI as collaborative learning partner
nodes.grounding_span: I would utilize AI to essentially give me a starting template or basic implementation to work off of, and include plenty of detail and documentation

nodes.label: AI for menial and redundant tasks
nodes.grounding_span: writing redundant code OR what I consider 'basic' code

nodes.label: AI reliability and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: there tends to be some small errors or slight differences in what I was asking for

nodes.label: AI as external memory and error-tracking system
nodes.grounding_span: I would use AI to essentially keep a running list of all of these pieces and what they do

nodes.label: Human creative direction and strategic judgment
nodes.grounding_span: The part of the job that I believe is most difficult to replace is the actual creative direction of what needs to be done

nodes.label: Efficiency and productivity
nodes.grounding_span: more work can be done in less time and using less resources

nodes.label: Learning and skill development
nodes.grounding_span: helps me break down complex tasks into smaller parts that are easier to understand and remember

nodes.label: Human autonomy and control
nodes.grounding_span: I gain a level of control over the implementation process without delegating it entirely to the AI

nodes.label: Positive satisfaction with AI as error-tracker
nodes.grounding_span: I noticed a clear difference once I started doing this

nodes.label: Frustration with AI errors in complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: there tends to be some small errors or slight differences

nodes.label: Optimistic expectation of AI improvement
nodes.grounding_span: I hope to eventually be able to use AI to help me jumpstart tasks quickly

nodes.label: Preference for collaborative over delegative AI use
nodes.grounding_span: My approach tends to be more focused on collaboration rather than delegation

nodes.label: Incremental task decomposition and iterative refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I opt to break the task down into pieces, and have the AI either help with or write entire code snippets

nodes.label: Pragmatic efficiency optimization
nodes.grounding_span: if I'm able to utilize the AI effectively for the task at hand, there are virtually no tasks where I would explicitly PREFER to handle them on my own
